meaning: n.卡里普索(特立尼达岛上土人即兴演唱的歌曲)adj.特立尼达岛上土人所演唱之歌曲的
examples: Two divers off the coast of France peer into Denise, a small two-man diving saucer that is part of Jacques Cousteau's oceanic ship Calypso.
I cooked, fished and played Calypso on the guitar.
With its attractive lines glowing a telegenic white against the dark ocean, Calypso was an enclosed world, a drama in itself.
Some scholars claim it was here Odysseus dallied for seven years with the goddess Calypso.
Oliver Wang reviews a CD called Panama: Latin, Calypso and Funk at the Isthmus.
